title: pogostemon szemaoensis
intro: Pogostemon szemaoensis, also known as Yulan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pogostemon szemaoensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Pogostemon szemaoensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
